## Purpose

State exactly what this pull request does and why it belongs in this repository.

## Classification

- [ ] Record preservation
- [ ] Documentation refinement
- [ ] Repository hygiene
- [ ] Workflow maintenance
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] Structural cleanup
- [ ] Other

## Scope of changes

- [ ] Adds material
- [ ] Revises material
- [ ] Removes material
- [ ] Corrects formatting or links
- [ ] Changes repository configuration
- [ ] Changes GitHub Actions or automation

## Validation completed

- [ ] Reviewed for factual accuracy
- [ ] Reviewed for clarity and consistency
- [ ] Confirmed Markdown renders correctly
- [ ] Confirmed YAML/config syntax is valid
- [ ] Confirmed no sensitive information was introduced
- [ ] Confirmed change is proportionate and necessary

## Record integrity

- [ ] No misleading edits to authorship, dates, or source context
- [ ] No unnecessary automation or maintenance churn introduced
- [ ] No change that undermines the repository’s archival or public-record function

## Additional context

List anything a reviewer should know before merging.
